description_long: This chair features a bold, modern design with a combination of plush, segmented red upholstery and a sturdy wooden frame. The seat, backrest, and armrests are all padded with a quilted, ribbed texture, providing both comfort and a visually striking appearance. The armrests curve downward and seamlessly integrate into the wooden base, which is angular and geometric, with open cutouts on the sides. The backrest is slightly rolled at the top, adding a touch of elegance and ergonomic support. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish that contrasts with the deep red upholstery. This chair is both functional and decorative, suitable for stylish urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale public waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with ribbed red upholstery and a geometric wooden frame, featuring curved armrests and a rolled backrest. The design is both comfortable and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ribbed red upholstery, rolled backrest, and the angular wooden base with a cutout.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, padded seat, curved armrests, and the quilted texture of the upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the same ribbed upholstery and wooden base details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel and the rolled top of the backrest, with armrest curves visible.
